name: image_crop
description: Crop an image to the specified bounding box

parameters.name: input_path
parameters.description: Path to the source image file

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description: Path where the cropped image will be saved

parameters.name: left
parameters.description: Left edge of the crop box in pixels

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Top edge of the crop box in pixels

parameters.name: right
parameters.description: Right edge of the crop box in pixels

parameters.name: bottom
parameters.description: Bottom edge of the crop box in pixels
